registerToken(address,string,string,uint.details: Registers a new token in the platform registry.

params.creator: The address of the token's creator.
params.decimals: The decimal precision of the token.
params.metadataURI: A URI pointing to the token's metadata.
params.name: The name of the token.
params.tokenAddress: The address of the newly created token.
params.tokenType: The type of the token from the TokenType enum.
params.totalSupply: The total supply of the token.
